item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
yes yes horse drawn carriages still exist
god bless pornhub
i never do those rides. all the rollercoasters though
easy
unfortunately
is that a normal thing to say to waiters? cringe
Simpsons reference
they didn't have to go so hard on the accuracy but they did
i am guessing that Anakin Skywalker won't be attending
RIP you were too beautiful for this world
everyone already knows what they are and how to use them so i won't bother explaining it
never been to any of those places, i want to try waffle house though
tapeworms are pretty much the grossest thing ever
mmm hmm
and the imgur community
my bug guy sent me this
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: I think I’m a hoarder… pt. 19
item.description: I was high beyond belief the first time I ever went to chipotle and it was so loud and I couldn’t hear a single question they asked me. Brown or white rice? Me: ???

item.title: Remember them?
item.description:
Remember these three young Mexican girls doing their cover of "Enter Sandman" from Metallica in 2013?
This is them now. Guitarist Danny, bassist Ale, and drummer Pau are now a full-fledged rock band blowing the roof of every place they play live. Already four albums out, the last one, Keep Me Fed, just hit the record stores recently.
item.dc:creator: BreakfastWithCountChocula

item.title: Game Over Man, Game Over!
item.description: At Comic-con a few years ago, Michael Beihn had a special request from a young fan dressed as Ellen Ripley. Her request was to be like Ripley and kill Aliens with Hicks. Beihn played it straight and channeled his inner Hicks, a role he did over 30 years ago and they acted out several scenes from the film together. Michael Beihn was always an actor who appreciated his fans. He's been going to Comic-con and other film conventions for past 15 years.
item.dc:creator: SweepTheLeg31

item.title: Time to chill
item.dc:creator: softballguy

item.title: A sandstorm at sea is very scary.
item.dc:creator: Dreamboy7

item.title: Tulsa sign thief
item.description:
Here it’s 5:45PM on 08/09 gf is putting the sign out. These videos have small time stamps in the bottom right corner.
07:21PM, Our sign thief, we’ll just call her “Beckie”. Gets out of her VERY unique drop top Mustang, steals the sign, hugging it like a giddy little school girl. I giggle every time I watch this one ?. We were HOME when she did it eating dinner, we didn’t notice until a bit later. Notifications for driveway cam were turned off by my gf because every car would trigger one.
Different angle of her approaching. Our camera motion and timing settings were not set right at the time on this camera, thankfully the driveway cam came in clutch. This would have had an even better shot of her but missed the mark.
I spent quite a few hours going through the front yard cam’s history trying to pin down where this bitch was coming from/ going. There was only one black convertible mustang that ever drives by, so I was pretty certain it was this person.
I spent hours looking for this stupid mustang. The night the sign was stolen I drove the whole damn neighborhood til the early A.M. I needed justice, God damnett! I didn’t find it the first two days (probably spent 5 hours looking). I assumed they probably park in a garage. Then on Saturday, my best friend who lives in the east side of our neighborhood asked me to look at his wife’s gaming PC that was crashing. I took a wrong turn in to a dead end cul de sac on the way over and lo and fucking behold I FOUND IT. I kept note of the address, this bitch lived two blocks away! Did a google deep dive, figured out the likely person and found them on FB. But other than that far away video, I didn’t have enough to build a solid case, and I didn’t want to confront anyone without 100% knowing they were the culprit. I needed hard evidence.
Two days later, Monday night. TRASH DAY! Guess whose trash is on the street and has the sign LITERALLY STICKING OUT THE TOP OF THEIR TRASH BIN. I called the non emergency PD line, let them know the situation, and they said to just take photos and/or video evidence and submit an online police report with all of these videos and more. I assumed nothing would come of that, but I was wrong! TPD detectives called me less than a week later, called our suspect, who at first denied it. I sent him a higher resolution video, and he called me back within an hour saying she admitted to it. An officer met me at my house and I signed her citation. They said since they didn’t witness the actual crime, I had to sign as witness. I got to see her actual citation. Needless to say I was thrilled. Court date is next week.
item.dc:creator: 8q4gc869tf101

item.title: Who’s really at fault here?
item.description: Getting a warning from Imgur or having your post taken down for violating community guidelines (showing thigh high socks) is bad, but questionable sexual ads are ok? Yeah idk man. That seems like hypocrisy. I’ve seen arguments that it’s the persons browser history. Sure…But why is that allowed to run on this site? It should be filtered.
item.dc:creator: WeatherWiz
